word: G1285 - διασαφέω - diasaphéō - dee-as-af-eh'-o - Tell unto

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διασαφέω

- Transliteration: Diasapheo

- Phonetic: dee-as-af-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to make clear or plain, to explain, unfold, declare

2. of things done, to declare i.e. to tell, announce, narrate

- Origin: from G1223 and saphes (clear)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and σαφής saphē s (clear); to clear thoroughly that is (figuratively) declare: - tell unto.
